message:
fix(articles): stop absolutely-positioning hero scroll indicator on mobile — use flow layout below phone breakpoint

The bakery, cmaes, and hoeffding articles each render a "scroll
indicator" (the uppercase-tracked caption + vertical rule that tells
readers to keep scrolling past the hero) by absolutely positioning it
against the viewport-sized hero section. On narrow phone widths
(320–375px) the EC / instrument / initialization visualization above
it does not fit in the hero's allotted space, so the absolutely-
positioned indicator ends up overlapping or crashing through the
visualization instead of sitting cleanly underneath it.

Switch each indicator to flow layout by default (mt-12 + flex column),
and restore the original absolute-to-viewport positioning only at the
md: breakpoint and up where the hero has enough vertical room to host
it without collision. This preserves the designed large-screen "floating
at bottom of hero" treatment while making the mobile experience obey
the normal document flow — nothing hides or overlaps the EC/instrument
block, and the reader still sees the "keep scrolling" affordance.

Hero per-article class changes:
- bakery-article.tsx     — wrapper: absolute+bottom-16 → mt-12 flex,
                           md:absolute md:bottom-16 md:left-0 md:w-full md:mt-0
- cmaes-article.tsx      — same pattern against the CMAES hero
- hoeffding-article.tsx  — same pattern, keeping the -translate-x-1/2
                           centering behind the md: breakpoint

Also add two new diagnostic Playwright specs (tests/e2e/_diag-*.spec.ts)
that drove the fix. They follow the existing _diag- prefix convention
(already tracked in this repo) and capture ecBottom/scrollTop/gap for
the affected articles across 320/360/375-width viewports so regressions
in the mobile layout can be reproduced quickly:

- tests/e2e/_diag-bakery-cmaes.spec.ts  — bakery_algorithm + cmaes_explainer
- tests/e2e/_diag-hoeffding.spec.ts     — hoeffdings_d_explainer

files.patch:
@@ -195,7 +195,7 @@ export function CMAESArticle() {
         </EC>
 
         <div
-          className="absolute bottom-16 left-0 w-full flex flex-col items-center gap-4 z-20 transition-opacity duration-500"
+          className="mt-12 flex flex-col items-center gap-4 z-20 transition-opacity duration-500 md:absolute md:bottom-16 md:left-0 md:w-full md:mt-0"
           style={{ opacity: Math.max(0, 0.5 - scrollProgress * 5) }}
         >
           <span className="text-[11px] uppercase tracking-[0.4em] text-white/40">
@@ -210,7 +210,7 @@ export function HoeffdingArticle() { Initialization
